plugins.name: dev-genie
plugins.description: Umbrella bootstrap plugin: /dev-genie-init detects project state and orchestrates installation of guardrails + audit, optionally scaffolding a baseline architecture.

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Architecture catalog (Next.js + Vercel, Node API, Supabase, Supabase RAG/pgvector) with ESLint + TypeScript guard rails enforcing layer boundaries, no cross-feature imports, and file/complexity caps.

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: Composite quality scoring across ESLint, TypeScript, tests, and security checks via /audit-init and /audit-run, plus a pre-commit gate.
